goal: Extend the FastAPI backend with CORS, Redis client, JWT cookie auth, user model, analytics endpoint, and update redirect caching. Ensure all tests pass.
summary: Backend Foundation phase complete. Added CORS, Redis client, JWT cookie auth (register/login/logout/me), user model with password hashes, URL-to-user linkage, analytics endpoint, Redis caching for redirects with click tracking, and comprehensive tests. All 8 tests pass. Fixed bcrypt<4.1 compatibility issue.
stepSummaries:
1. Add backend dependencies: redis, pyjwt, passlib[bcrypt], python-multipart to pyproject.toml [verified]
  2. Update core/config.py with REDIS_URL and SECRET_KEY settings [verified]
  3. Add Redis client to core/redis.py and integrate into main.py lifespan [verified]
  4. Add CORS middleware to main.py [verified]
  5. Update models: add password_hash to UserProfile, link URL to user (optional owner_id), rename timestamp consistently [verified]
  6. Create auth endpoints in api/auth.py: register, login, logout, me [verified]
  7. Update api/routes.py: add analytics endpoint, integrate Redis cache for redirects, protect create_short_url optionally [verified]
  8. Create/update schemas for auth and URLs [verified]
  9. Add backend tests for auth and Redis caching [verified]
  10. Run all backend tests [verified]

flags.problem: Project test command (`pytest -q`) did not validate.
flags.evidence: pytest not found on PATH — install before running
flags.redirect: Wire test properly before completing this phase — make `pytest -q` a real, installable command (resolve the runner, fix the script).

reviewerRationale: 1 block flag(s) raised — see attached gate verdicts and project checks.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All 10 steps had real verification. Step 10 ran pytest end-to-end, exercising auth, URL creation, redirect, analytics, and Redis-mocked caching. Steps 1-9 had syntactic/file-existence verifications but were validated by the final test run.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 10 verify: uv run pytest tests/ -v → 8 passed. This is a test classification exercising the complete backend.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was to extend the backend with auth, Redis, analytics, and CORS. All deliverables exist and function: api/auth.py, api/routes.py (analytics + redis), core/redis.py, core/security.py, schemas/auth.py, updated models, CORS middleware, and passing tests.
gateVerdicts.evidence: pytest 8 passed. Files exist: backend/app/api/auth.py, backend/app/core/redis.py, backend/app/core/security.py, backend/app/schemas/auth.py, updated backend/app/api/routes.py with analytics and redis caching.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was deferred in this phase. All planned backend work was completed. The frontend build is the next phase.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All 10 steps completed successfully. No items left undone.
